summary: Iteration 186: Sicurezza & PNRR Compliance + Workflow Engine. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: MontaggioPanel has 6 sub-steps (SICUREZZA, DDT, SERRAGGIO, VARIANTI, CANTIERE, FIRMA), DNSH section with analyze button and results display, CSE export button working.
critical_code_review_comments: sicurezza.py: CORSI_OBBLIGATORI correctly defines 6 mandatory D.Lgs 81/08 courses
sicurezza.py: check-operatore endpoint is public (no auth) for workflow gate usage
sicurezza.py: cantiere endpoint validates mandatory foto_panoramica_doc_id (returns 400 if empty)
sicurezza.py: targa-ce generates QR data in format 'CE|numero|targa_id|date'
sicurezza.py: manutenzione-schedule creates 12 and 24 month entries using dateutil.relativedelta
sicurezza.py: CSE export generates ZIP with 4 folders (DURC_POS, ATTESTATI_OPERAI, CERTIFICATI_MACCHINE, SICUREZZA_CANTIERE)
officina.py: Timer START (line ~210) calls check_sicurezza_operatore and blocks with 403 if courses missing/expired
montaggio.py: Firma endpoint (line ~345) triggers targa-ce and manutenzione-schedule automatically
MontaggioPanel.js: STEPS array correctly includes 6 sub-steps with icons
SicurezzaCantiereSection: Shows 'done' state when checklist already completed
DNSHSection.js: Displays DNSH status, analyze button, and results with badges
CommessaOpsPanel.js: Includes DNSH section and CSE export section with proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created DNSH data entry via API test (dnsh_438720b774)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 186 tested Sicurezza & PNRR Compliance module + Workflow Engine. Key endpoints: (1) /api/sicurezza/corsi-obbligatori returns 6 courses, (2) /api/sicurezza/check-operatore/{op_id} is public workflow gate, (3) /api/sicurezza/cantiere requires mandatory photo, (4) /api/sicurezza/targa-ce and /api/sicurezza/manutenzione-schedule are public workflow triggers, (5) DNSH and CSE endpoints require auth. Workflow: Timer START checks safety courses (403 if blocked), Firma triggers targa-ce + manutenzioni. Frontend: MontaggioPanel has 6 steps starting with SICUREZZA, CommessaOpsPanel has DNSH and CSE sections.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/sicurezza/targa-ce: ✓ Generates CE plate with QR data (200)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/officina/timer START: ✓ Passes for operator with valid courses (not 403)

MontaggioPanel.6_substeps: ✓ SICUREZZA, DDT, SERRAGGIO, VARIANTI, CANTIERE, FIRMA all visible

CommessaOpsPanel.dnsh_results: ✓ Shows DNSH OK badge and 30% riciclato badge
